completion_summary: Implemented candidate-only executable semantic-invariance controls for all six serious tasks: reversible opaque material-code remapping, observation key reordering, nested/key-reordered equivalent action sequences, JSON formatting perturbations, explicit paired tolerances, deterministic report binding, and fail-closed malformed mappings/protocols. Evidence: 12 paired full median-recipe runs (6 tasks x 2 seeds), all five probes passed with zero observation/reward delta; 14 semantic/publication/leakage tests passed; Ruff and mypy passed; claim check passed. Reference evidence: none required because this is a public-boundary contract audit. Known limitations: boundary remapping does not claim physical material-identity exchangeability; no formal method comparison, public-harness isolation, exploit matrix, or publication readiness is claimed; publication v0.1 remains unchanged. Implementation commit 8c928ff; integration commit 7a0b7e1.
scope: Add a candidate-only executable semantic-invariance boundary audit across all six serious tasks: reversible opaque material-code remapping, observation field reordering, equivalent nested action sequences, JSON formatting perturbations, paired tolerances, and fail-closed invalid mappings without changing frozen task or runtime semantics
